mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO MEMBER ( user_id, password, name, birth_date, email, phone, address, gender ) VALUES ( #{user_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birth_date, jdbcType=DATE}, #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender, jdbcType=CHAR}
)
mapper.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET password = #{password, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email = #{email, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phone = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender, jdbcType=CHAR}, birth_date = #{birth_date, jdbcType=DATE} WHERE user_id = #{user_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
SELECT p.PLACE_ID , p.PLACE_TYPE , p.NAME , p.ADDRESS , p.IMAGE_URL , p.VIEW_COUNT , p.LATITUDE , p.LONGITUDE , p.CREATED_AT AS placeRegDate
, (SELECT NVL(ROUND(AVG(rv.RATING), 1), 0) FROM REVIEW rv WHERE rv.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID AND rv.STATUS = 'DISPLAY') AS avg_rating
, (SELECT COUNT(rv.REVIEW_ID) FROM REVIEW rv WHERE rv.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID AND rv.STATUS = 'DISPLAY') AS review_count FROM PLACE p JOIN FAVORITE f ON p.PLACE_ID = f.PLACE_ID WHERE f.USER_ID = #{user_id} ORDER BY f.CREATED_AT DESC
